function App() {
  const [budget, setBudget] = React.useState(5000);
  const [expenses, setExpenses] = React.useState<{
    id: string;
    description: string;
    amount: number;
    date: string;
  }[]>([]);
  const [description, setDescription] = React.useState("");
  const [amount, setAmount] = React.useState("");
  const [error, setError] = React.useState("");

  const totalExpenses = expenses.reduce((sum, exp) => sum + exp.amount, 0);
  const remaining = budget - totalExpenses;

  const handleAddExpense = () => {
    setError("");

    if (!description.trim()) {
      setError("Please enter a description");
      return;
    }

    const parsedAmount = parseFloat(amount);
    if (isNaN(parsedAmount) || parsedAmount <= 0) {
      setError("Please enter a valid amount");
      return;
    }

    if (parsedAmount > remaining) {
      setError("Amount exceeds remaining budget");
      return;
    }

    const newExpense = {
      id: Date.now().toString(),
      description: description.trim(),
      amount: parsedAmount,
      date: new Date().toLocaleDateString(),
    };

    setExpenses([...expenses, newExpense]);
    setDescription("");
    setAmount("");
  };

  const handleDeleteExpense = (id: string) => {
    setExpenses(expenses.filter((exp) => exp.id !== id));
  };

  const handleBudgetChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const value = parseFloat(e.target.value);
    if (!isNaN(value) && value > 0) {
      setBudget(value);
      setError("");
    }
  };

  const percentageUsed = (totalExpenses / budget) * 100;

  return (
    <div
      style={{
        minHeight: "100vh",
        padding: "20px",
        fontFamily: "system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif",
        backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)",
        color: "var(--color-text)",
      }}
    >
      <div
        style={{
          maxWidth: "600px",
          margin: "0 auto",
        }}
      >
        <h1 style={{ marginBottom: "30px", textAlign: "center" }}>
          Budget Tracker
        </h1>

        <div
          style={{
            backgroundColor: "rgba(var(--color-accent-rgb, 100, 100, 255), 0.1)",
            padding: "20px",
            borderRadius: "8px",
            marginBottom: "30px",
            border: "2px solid var(--color-accent)",
          }}
        >
          <label style={{ display: "block", marginBottom: "10px" }}>
            Total Budget: ${budget.toFixed(2)}
          </label>
          <input
            type="number"
            value={budget}
            onChange={handleBudgetChange}
            style={{
              width: "100%",
              padding: "10px",
              borderRadius: "4px",
              border: "1px solid var(--color-accent)",
              backgroundColor: "transparent",
              color: "var(--color-text)",
              fontSize: "16px",
              boxSizing: "border-box",
            }}
            min="1"
            step="100"
          />
        </div>

        <div
          style={{
            display: "grid",
            gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr",
            gap: "20px",
            marginBottom: "30px",
          }}
        >
          <div
            style={{
              padding: "20px",
              borderRadius: "8px",
              backgroundColor: "rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1)",
              border: "1px solid rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.3)",
            }}
          >
            <p style={{ margin: "0 0 8px 0", fontSize: "14px", opacity: 0.8 }}>
              Remaining
            </p>
            <p
              style={{
                margin: 0,
                fontSize: "24px",
                fontWeight: "bold",
                color: remaining >= 0 ? "#4caf50" : "#f44336",
              }}
            >
              ${remaining.toFixed(2)}
            </p>
          </div>

          <div
            style={{
              padding: "20px",
              borderRadius: "8px",
              backgroundColor: "rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.1)",
              border: "1px solid rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.3)",
            }}
          >
            <p style={{ margin: "0 0 8px 0", fontSize: "14px", opacity: 0.8 }}>
              Total Spent
            </p>
            <p
              style={{
                margin: 0,
                fontSize: "24px",
                fontWeight: "bold",
                color: "#ff9800",
              }}
            >
              ${totalExpenses.toFixed(2)}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div
          style={{
            marginBottom: "30px",
          }}
        >
          <div
            style={{
              display: "flex",
              justifyContent: "space-between",
              marginBottom: "8px",
            }}
          >
            <span style={{ fontSize: "14px" }}>Budget Usage</span>
            <span
              style={{
                fontSize: "14px",
                fontWeight: "bold",
                color: "var(--color-accent)",
              }}
            >
              {percentageUsed.toFixed(1)}%
            </span>
          </div>
          <div
            style={{
              width: "100%",
              height: "8px",
              backgroundColor: "rgba(100, 100, 100, 0.2)",
              borderRadius: "4px",
              overflow: "hidden",
            }}
          >
            <div
              style={{
                width: `${Math.min(percentageUsed, 100)}%`,
                height: "100%",
                backgroundColor:
                  percentageUsed > 90
                    ? "#f44336"
                    : percentageUsed > 75
                      ? "#ff9800"
                      : "var(--color-accent)",
                transition: "width 0.3s ease",
              }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div
          style={{
            backgroundColor: "rgba(var(--color-accent-rgb, 100, 100, 255), 0.05)",
            padding: "20px",
            borderRadius: "8px",
            marginBottom: "30px",
            border: "1px solid rgba(var(--color-accent-rgb, 100, 100, 255), 0.2)",
          }}
        >
          <h3 style={{ marginTop: 0, marginBottom: "15px" }}>Add Expense</h3>

          <input
            type="text"
            placeholder="Description"
            value={description}
            onChange={(e) => setDescription(e.target.value)}
            style={{
              width: "100%",
              padding: "10px",
              marginBottom: "10px",
              borderRadius: "4px",
              border: "1px solid var(--color-accent)",
              backgroundColor: "transparent",
              color: "var(--color-text)",
              boxSizing: "border-box",
              fontSize: "14px",
            }}
            onKeyPress={(e) => {
              if (e.key === "Enter") handleAddExpense();
            }}
          />

          <input
            type="number"
            placeholder="Amount"
            value={amount}
            onChange={(e) => setAmount(e.target.value)}
            style={{
              width: "100%",
              padding: "10px",
              marginBottom: "10px",
              borderRadius: "4px",
              border: "1px solid var(--color-accent)",
              backgroundColor: "transparent",
              color: "var(--color-text)",
              boxSizing: "border-box",
              fontSize: "14px",
            }}
            onKeyPress={(e) => {
              if (e.key === "Enter") handleAddExpense();
            }}
            min="0"
            step="0.01"
          />

          {error && (
            <p style={{ color: "#f44336", margin: "10px 0", fontSize: "14px" }}>
              {error}
            </p>
          )}

          <button
            onClick={handleAddExpense}
            style={{
              width: "100%",
              padding: "10px",
              borderRadius: "4px",
              border: "none",
              backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)",
              color: "white",
              fontSize: "16px",
              fontWeight: "bold",
              cursor: "pointer",
              transition: "opacity 0.2s",
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              (e.target as HTMLButtonElement).style.opacity = "0.9";
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              (e.target as HTMLButtonElement).style.opacity = "1";
            }}
          >
            Add Expense
          </button>
        </div>

        {expenses.length > 0 && (
          <div>
            <h3 style={{ marginBottom: "15px" }}>Recent Expenses</h3>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "10px" }}>
              {expenses.map((expense) => (
                <div
                  key={expense.id}
                  style={{
                    display: "flex",
                    justifyContent: "space-between",
                    alignItems: "center",
                    padding: "12px",
                    backgroundColor: "rgba(var(--color-accent-rgb, 100, 100, 255), 0.05)",
                    borderRadius: "4px",
                    border: "1px solid rgba(var(--color-accent-rgb, 100, 100, 255), 0.2)",
                  }}
                >
                  <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                    <p style={{ margin: "0 0 4px 0", fontWeight: "500" }}>
                      {expense.description}
                    </p>
                    <p
                      style={{
                        margin: 0,
                        fontSize: "12px",
                        opacity: 0.7,
                      }}
                    >
                      {expense.date}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "10px", alignItems: "center" }}>
                    <span
                      style={{
                        fontWeight: "bold",
                        color: "var(--color-accent)",
                        minWidth: "80px",
                        textAlign: "right",
                      }}
                    >
                      ${expense.amount.toFixed(2)}
                    </span>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => handleDeleteExpense(expense.id)}
                      style={{
                        padding: "4px 8px",
                        borderRadius: "4px",
                        border: "none",
                        backgroundColor: "#f44336",
                        color: "white",
                        cursor: "pointer",
                        fontSize: "12px",
                        transition: "opacity 0.2s",
                      }}
                      onMouseEnter={(e) => {
                        (e.target as HTMLButtonElement).style.opacity = "0.9";
                      }}
                      onMouseLeave={(e) => {
                        (e.target as HTMLButtonElement).style.opacity = "1";
                      }}
                    >
                      Delete
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {expenses.length === 0 && (
          <p style={{ textAlign: "center", opacity: 0.5, marginTop: "40px" }}>
            No expenses yet. Add one to get started!
          </p>
        )}
      </div>

      <style>{`
        :root {
          --color-surface: #1e1e2e;
          --color-text: #e0e0e0;
          --color-accent: #6366f1;
          --color-accent-rgb: 99, 102, 241;
        }

        * {
          box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        body {
          margin: 0;
          padding: 0;
        }

        input::placeholder {
          color: var(--color-text);
          opacity: 0.5;
        }

        input:focus {
          outline: none;
          box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(var(--color-accent-rgb), 0.3);
        }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}

export default App;
